description: 外流新笔记排查SOP - PromQL查询集合
_datasource_rule: 【强制执行规则】执行每条 query 时：若 query 内有独立的 datasource 字段，必须使用该字段值，不得使用 step 级默认 datasource。step 级 datasource 只作用于没有独立 datasource 字段的 query。当 query 返回 0 条数据时，第一步必须回源检查该 query 的 datasource 字段是否正确，而不是凭猜测枚举其他 datasource。

step1.name: 确认新笔记曝光占比下跌
step1.description: 查询1H和24H新笔记曝光占比，必须同时查 -1d/-7d/-14d 三条基准线做置信度校验后再判断异常
step1.baseline_confidence_check: 先查三条基准线互相校验：任意两条差异>15%则较高者标记不置信，仅用置信基准与今天对比

1h_current.description: 1H新笔记曝光占比 - 当前值

1h_offset_1d.description: 1H新笔记曝光占比 - 昨天同期（基准线1，需置信度校验）

1h_offset_7d.description: 1H新笔记曝光占比 - 上周同期（基准线2，需置信度校验）

1h_offset_14d.description: 1H新笔记曝光占比 - 两周前同期（基准线3，需置信度校验）

24h_current.description: 24H新笔记曝光占比 - 当前值

24h_offset_1d.description: 24H新笔记曝光占比 - 昨天同期（基准线1，需置信度校验）

24h_offset_7d.description: 24H新笔记曝光占比 - 上周同期（基准线2，需置信度校验）

24h_offset_14d.description: 24H新笔记曝光占比 - 两周前同期（基准线3，需置信度校验）

step2.name: 定位下跌阶段
step2.description: 查询各阶段(postrank/finalrank等)新笔记占比

by_phase.promql: sum by (phase) (rate(new_note_cnt_sum{application="arkfeedx", sub_appid=~"arkfeedx-1-default", env=~"prod", zone=~"(alhz1|alsh1-gray|qcnj2|rcsh1|alhz1-3|alhz1-4|qcnj2-3|qcnj2-4|rcsh1-5)", type=~"1h", subPhase="after"}[1m]))/sum by (phase) (rate(note_size_cnt_sum{application="arkfeedx", sub_appid=~"arkfeedx-1-default", env=~"prod", zone=~"(alhz1|alsh1-gray|qcnj2|rcsh1|alhz1-3|alhz1-4|qcnj2-3|qcnj2-4|rcsh1-5)", subPhase="after"}[1m]))
by_phase.description: 各阶段新笔记占比（需添加offset对比）

step2_5.name: 矛盾判断 - 检查笔记年龄
step2_5.description: 当recall↓但渠道正常时，检查笔记年龄

step3.name: 召回渠道排查
step3.description: 查询各召回渠道召回量

channel_recall.promql: sum by (name) (rate(recall_num_exp_sum{application="arkfeedx", sub_appid=~"arkfeedx-1-default", env=~"prod", name=~"DSSM_MODEL_BASE|DSSM_MODEL_BASE_RERANK|MLLM_CLUSTER_MLP_1W|MLLM_CLUSTER|MLLM_CLUSTER_10W|MLLM_SID_TWO|ES|FOLLOW|DSSM_INST|DSSM_LOWNV|DSSM_LOW_ENGAGE|MLLM_NOTE_EMBEDDING|U2U_MF|PDN|DSSM_MODEL|DSSM_TOPK|DSSM_TAX_MASK|DSSM_LOW_ENGAGE|DSSM_PICTURE|MAXIMA_COLD_START|MAXIMA_OUT_OF_24H|DSSM_NEWNOTE_UNITY|DSSM_OUTOF24H_1000PV|DSSM_EMB_I2I_OUTOF24H_1000PV|DSSM_EMB_I2I|MLLM_SEQ_U2I|MLLM_SEQ_U2I_V2"}[1m]))/sum by (name) (rate(recall_num_exp_sum{application="arkfeedx", sub_appid=~"arkfeedx-1-default", env=~"prod", name=~"DSSM_MODEL_BASE|DSSM_MODEL_BASE_RERANK|MLLM_CLUSTER_MLP_1W|MLLM_CLUSTER|MLLM_CLUSTER_10W|MLLM_SID_TWO|ES|FOLLOW|DSSM_INST|DSSM_LOWNV|DSSM_LOW_ENGAGE|MLLM_NOTE_EMBEDDING|U2U_MF|PDN|DSSM_MODEL|DSSM_TOPK|DSSM_TAX_MASK|DSSM_LOW_ENGAGE|DSSM_PICTURE|MAXIMA_COLD_START|MAXIMA_OUT_OF_24H|DSSM_NEWNOTE_UNITY|DSSM_OUTOF24H_1000PV|DSSM_EMB_I2I_OUTOF24H_1000PV|DSSM_EMB_I2I|MLLM_SEQ_U2I|MLLM_SEQ_U2I_V2"}[1m] offset 1d))

step4.name: 召回根因分析
step4.description: 种子个数、笔记年龄、quota分析

seed_count.promql: sum by (reason_type) (rate(retrieval_end_to_end_reasontype_seed_num_sum{application="arkfeedx", sub_appid=~"arkfeedx-1-default", env=~"prod", zone=~"(alhz1|alsh1-gray|qcnj2|rcsh1|alhz1-3|alhz1-4|qcnj2-3|qcnj2-4|rcsh1-5)", reason_type=~"DSSM_LOW_ENGAGE"}[1m]))/sum by (reason_type) (rate(retrieval_end_to_end_reasontype_seed_num_count{application="arkfeedx", sub_appid=~"arkfeedx-1-default", env=~"prod", zone=~"(alhz1|alsh1-gray|qcnj2|rcsh1|alhz1-3|alhz1-4|qcnj2-3|qcnj2-4|rcsh1-5)", reason_type=~"DSSM_LOW_ENGAGE"}[1m]))

step5.name: 索引表排查
step5.description: 索引quota、omega笔记年龄、数据新鲜度

index_quota.promql: sum by (reason_type,name) (rate(vec_reason_and_pool_cnt_sum{application="arkfeedx", sub_appid=~"arkfeedx-1-default", env=~"prod", zone=~"(alhz1|alsh1-gray|qcnj2|rcsh1|alhz1-3|alhz1-4|qcnj2-3|qcnj2-4|rcsh1-5)", reason_type=~"DSSM_MODEL_BASE|DSSM_MODEL_BASE_RERANK|MLLM_CLUSTER_MLP_1W|MLLM_CLUSTER|MLLM_CLUSTER_10W|MLLM_SID_TWO|ES|FOLLOW|DSSM_INST|DSSM_LOWNV|DSSM_LOW_ENGAGE|MLLM_NOTE_EMBEDDING|U2U_MF|PDN|DSSM_MODEL|DSSM_TOPK|DSSM_TAX_MASK|DSSM_LOW_ENGAGE|DSSM_PICTURE|MAXIMA_COLD_START|MAXIMA_OUT_OF_24H|DSSM_NEWNOTE_UNITY|DSSM_OUTOF24H_1000PV|DSSM_EMB_I2I_OUTOF24H_1000PV|DSSM_EMB_I2I|MLLM_SEQ_U2I|MLLM_SEQ_U2I_V2"}[1m]))/sum by (reason_type,name) (rate(vec_reason_and_pool_cnt_count{application="arkfeedx", sub_appid=~"arkfeedx-1-default", env=~"prod", zone=~"(alhz1|alsh1-gray|qcnj2|rcsh1|alhz1-3|alhz1-4|qcnj2-3|qcnj2-4|rcsh1-5)", reason_type=~"DSSM_MODEL_BASE|DSSM_MODEL_BASE_RERANK|MLLM_CLUSTER_MLP_1W|MLLM_CLUSTER|MLLM_CLUSTER_10W|MLLM_SID_TWO|ES|FOLLOW|DSSM_INST|DSSM_LOWNV|DSSM_LOW_ENGAGE|MLLM_NOTE_EMBEDDING|U2U_MF|PDN|DSSM_MODEL|DSSM_TOPK|DSSM_TAX_MASK|DSSM_LOW_ENGAGE|DSSM_PICTURE|MAXIMA_COLD_START|MAXIMA_OUT_OF_24H|DSSM_NEWNOTE_UNITY|DSSM_OUTOF24H_1000PV|DSSM_EMB_I2I_OUTOF24H_1000PV|DSSM_EMB_I2I|MLLM_SEQ_U2I|MLLM_SEQ_U2I_V2"}[1m]))

post_release_monitor.name: 发布后监控（渐进式故障预警）

trend_hourly.description: 每小时查询一次，观察趋势
